name: Classic Oversold
description: RSI14 below threshold AND price close to 200-day SMA or 90-day low. Contrarian, short-to-medium horizon.

name: Mean Reversion (Bollinger Bands)
description: Price touches or closes below lower Bollinger Band (20, 2). Short horizon mean-reversion candidate.

name: Momentum Breakout
description: Closing at/above 52-week high with volume > 30-day avg × factor. Momentum style.

name: Golden Cross
description: 50-day SMA crossed above 200-day SMA within last N days. Long-term trend follow.

name: Quality Stock Pullback
description: Quality companies in long-term uptrend that pulled back to 50SMA and meet quality checks.

name: Fundamental Divergence
description: Fundamentally high-quality but underperforming vs sector/index. Contrarian value discovery.

name: Volatility Squeeze
description: Bollinger Bandwidth near 6-month low — possible breakout setup.

name: High-Quality Dividend
description: Attractive dividend yield with sustainable payout ratio and low leverage — income-oriented.
